description: RPG character statistics for multiple game systems. Per-system rkey records are primary; legacy self records are compatibility-only.

main.description: Primary per-system rkey record shape, with legacy self shape retained only for compatibility.

system.description: Per-system rkey envelope: the system identifier for this record (e.g. 'dcc', 'fashionista').

data.description: Per-system rkey envelope: system payload object when using rkey-per-system records.

dcc.description: Dungeon Crawl Classics RPG character sheet

rmmz.description: RPG Maker MZ engine character parameters

custom.description: DEPRECATED: Use a unique top-level system key instead (e.g. 'mycoolrpg'). This singular slot is retained for backwards compatibility only.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this record was last modified

vampire.description: Vampire: The Masquerade 5th Edition character sheet

fashionista.description: Fashionista style game — outfit curation, walk replays, and yah/nah taste reviews

daggerheart.description: Daggerheart TTRPG character sheet (Darrington Press, used under DPCGL)

pathfinderStats.description: Pathfinder 2e character sheet. All sub-objects optional.

identity.description: Character identity (ancestry, class, heritage, level, etc.)

scores.description: Ability score modifiers (the +/- number, not the raw score)

proficiencies.description: Proficiency rank strings: untrained, trained, expert, master, legendary

feats.description: Feats gained (ancestry, class, general, skill, etc.)

money.description: Currency in platinum, gold, silver, copper

conditions.description: Active condition values (boolean or integer severity)

spellcasting.description: Spellcasting entries (prepared, spontaneous, focus, innate, ritual)

starfinderStats.description: Starfinder 2e character sheet. All sub-objects optional.

identity.description: Character identity (ancestry, class, heritage, level, etc.)

proficiencies.description: Proficiency rank strings; SF2e skills include computers and piloting

attacks.description: Strike actions (ranged weapons include ammo tracking)

money.description: SF2e currency: credits (standard) and UPB (Universal Polymer Base, for crafting)

conditions.description: Same condition list as PF2e (shared ruleset)

dndStats.description: D&D 5e character sheet. All sub-objects are optional.

abilities.description: The six ability scores (STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA)

combat.description: Combat stats (AC, speed, initiative, hit dice)

features.description: Class features, racial traits, and feats

dccStats.description: Dungeon Crawl Classics RPG character sheet. Supports 0-level funnel characters through 10th level.

abilities.description: The six ability scores (STR, AGI, STA, INT, PER, LUK)

combat.description: Combat stats (AC, speed, action die, initiative, crit die/table)

warrior.description: Warrior/Dwarf class features (deed die, mighty deeds)

cleric.description: Cleric spellcasting (disapproval, turn unholy, lay on hands)

notes.description: Character notes, backstory, and special abilities

abilitiesNotes.description: Notes about special abilities, class features, and racial traits

class.description: Class (Warrior, Wizard, Cleric, Thief, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling)

dccAbilities.description: DCC ability scores (3-18 standard, can be modified by corruption/spellburn)

birthAugur.description: Birth augur name (e.g., Harsh Winter, The Bull, Fortunate Date)

birthAugurEffect.description: What the luck modifier applies to

startingLuck.description: Starting luck score (for tracking burned luck)

luckyWeapon.description: Weapon type that luck applies to (Dwarves/Halflings)

dccHp.description: Hit points (0-level characters use 1d4 + STA mod)

ac.description: Armor Class (10 + armor + AGI mod + shield)

critDie.description: Critical hit die (e.g., d8, d12, d14)

critTable.description: Critical hit table (I, II, III, IV, V)

fumbleDie.description: Fumble die (typically d4 for 0-level, varies by armor)

dccAttack.description: A weapon attack (includes deed die for warriors)

attackMod.description: Attack modifier (e.g., +2, d16+2 for deed die)

deedDie.description: Current deed die (d3, d4, d5, d6, d7, d8, d10+d3, etc.)

luckyWeapon.description: Weapon type luck modifier applies to

undergroundSkills.description: Underground detection bonus (Dwarves: equal to level)

knownSpells.description: Known spells with mercurial magic effects

dccWizardSpell.description: A wizard spell with mercurial magic effect

mercurialMagic.description: Unique mercurial magic effect (d100 roll result)

mercurialRoll.description: The d100 roll for mercurial magic

lost.description: Spell is currently lost (must be re-learned)

dccCorruption.description: A corruption effect from failed spell checks

layOnHandsDie.description: Lay on hands die (e.g., d14, d16)

unholy.description: Serves a Chaotic deity (unholy instead of holy)

luckyWeapon.description: Weapon type that luck applies to (one type only)

dccThiefSkills.description: Thief skill bonuses (roll d20 + skill vs target)

sneakAndHide.description: Bonus to sneak/hide when in natural environment

luckyWeapon.description: Weapon type luck modifier applies to

goodLuckCharm.description: Can spend luck to aid nearby allies

luckSpentOnAllies.description: Total luck points spent helping allies

abilities.description: The six ability scores (1-30 per SRD)

deathSaves.description: Death saving throw successes and failures

saves.description: Saving throw modifiers (actual values, not proficiency flags)

skills.description: Skill modifiers (actual values, not proficiency flags)

customStats.description: DEPRECATED: Legacy singular custom system. New implementations should write their own top-level key with freeform stat objects instead.

spotemStats.description: Spot 'Em! mini-game statistics — pick the right character from a scene based on trait clues.

lastDaily.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last completed Daily Hunt

prizeRounds.description: Streak milestones at which a Prize Round was earned

mageVariableStat.description: A variable-titled background or trait with a dot value.

mageWillpower.description: Willpower permanent rating and temporary pool.

role.description: Character role (Rockerboy, Solo, Netrunner, Techie, Medtechie, Media, Cop, Corporate, Fixer, Nomad)

btwc.description: Body Type Modifier (BTM, negative values allowed)

cpRoleSkill.description: A single role ability entry with an editable title and rank.

cpWeapon.description: A single weapon entry in Cyberpunk 2020.

cpWare.description: A single cyberware entry in Cyberpunk 2020.

vampireStats.description: Vampire: The Masquerade 5th Edition character sheet.

health.description: Health pip track fill count (0=unharmed, 15=all filled)

bloodSurge.description: Blood Surge dice bonus label (e.g. '+2 dice')

havenNone.description: True if the character has no haven

vampireDiscipline.description: One Discipline slot: selected type, dot rating, and named powers.

vampireAdvantage.description: A named advantage slot (background, merit, flaw, or haven feature) with a dot value.

vampireWeapon.description: A weapon entry in a VTM character sheet.

dmg.description: Damage dice or static damage descriptor

fashionistaStats.description: Fashionista style game. Tracks the actor's self-declared vibe, their outfit and walk snapshots, and their yah/nah taste reviews of others. Reviews on others live on the reviewer's own PDS; the server aggregates incoming reviews for display.

serving.description: Self-declared style vibe, e.g. 'flicness with a hint of retro'

yah.description: Actors this player rated yah, newest first. Lives on the reviewer's own PDS.

nah.description: Actors this player rated nah, newest first. Lives on the reviewer's own PDS.

walk.description: The actor's saved best catwalk replay. One slot; overwritten on save.

rude.description: DIDs of voters whose ratings are hidden from this actor's profile. Managed by the actor themselves.

fashionistaVote.description: A single yah or nah vote entry. The vote direction (yah/nah) is determined by which array it appears in.

did.description: DID of the actor being reviewed

giving.description: Optional one-liner review, e.g. 'It's giving queen energy!'

spriteCid.description: CID of the subject's spriteSheet blob at review time. Captures what they were wearing.

fashionistaFit.description: A snapshot of the actor's saved best-fit outfit. Stores layer metadata (no blob copies); the compiled sprite is referenced by CID.

layers.description: Ordered layer config, back-to-front. No blob data — use generator record blobs for recomposition.

spriteCid.description: CID of the compiled spriteSheet blob at time of save

fashionistaFitLayer.description: A single layer in a fit snapshot — config only, no blob.

behindRows.description: Row indices where this layer composites behind the body

fashionistaWalk.description: A single saved catwalk walk replay. One slot per actor; overwritten on save.

spriteBlob.description: Snapshot copy of the spriteSheet worn during this walk. Permanently anchored to this record so the replay always shows the original outfit, even if the actor's .sprite is updated later.

spriteCid.description: CID of the spriteSheet used during this walk (legacy string CID; prefer spriteBlob for new records)

fashionistaWalkEvent.description: A single motion event in a walk replay. x/y are normalised position * 1000 (0–1000 = 0.000–1.000).

t.description: Timestamp offset in milliseconds from walk start

type.description: Event type: start, pos, jump, twirl, spin, exit

dir.description: Facing direction: up, down, left, right

daggerheartStats.description: Daggerheart TTRPG character sheet root (Darrington Press, DPCGL licensed)

ancestryFeature.description: Text of chosen ancestry feature (A or B)

hpMinorThreshold.description: Damage at or below this = Minor Damage

hpMajorThreshold.description: Damage at or below this = Major Damage

hpSevereThreshold.description: Damage above Major threshold = Severe Damage

deathMarks.description: Marks made when HP reaches 0; 3 = character death

deathMarkMax.description: Number of death marks before character dies (usually 3)
